About the App

Professional Scanning Tools for the Field

Built for civil engineers, site supervisors, and construction teams who need accuracy and full traceability on the job site.

1

Detect Cracks Using Vision

On-device neural network identifies hairline, surface, and structural cracks — requires an internet connection for processing.

2

Measure with ARKit

Apple's AR framework calculates crack width and length in real-world millimeters with high precision.

3

Manage Projects & Scan History

Organise scans by building, floor, and element. Track crack progression across multiple site visits.

4

Generate PDF Reports

One-tap reports with photos, measurements, severity ratings, and full timelines — shareable directly from the app.

ARKit
Precision Measurement
PDF
Instant Report Export
Key Features

Everything You Need on the Job Site

Six precision-engineered capabilities built for field professionals.

01

Smart Crack Detection

Machine learning model trained on structural images detects cracks in real time — requires internet connection.

Core ML
02

AR-Based Measurement

ARKit depth sensing measures crack length, width, and depth accurately — directly from your iPhone.

ARKit
03

Project-Based Scanning

Create projects for buildings or sites. Organise by structure, floor, or element for full traceability.

Organised
04

Severity Classification

Automatically classifies each crack as Low, Medium, High, or Critical — based on standard engineering practice.

Auto-classify
05

Scan History Tracking

Log every scan with timestamps and photos. Compare crack progression between visits and flag urgent changes.

Timeline
06

Report Generation

Generate PDF reports with photos, measurements, severity, and location data — ready to share with clients.

PDF export
Inside the App

Designed for Field Work

Every screen is built for speed and clarity — in direct sunlight, on a construction site.

01

Dashboard & Active Scans

See all active projects, open cracks, and recent scans at a glance with one-tap scan access.

02

Project & Issue Tracking

Filter by status. View total cracks, critical issues, and scan progress per project.

03

Crack Detail & Re-Scan

Full measurements, photos, notes, and timeline — plus one-tap re-scan to track changes over time.

04

PDF Report Generation

Generate professional PDF reports with photos, measurements, severity ratings, and full project data — ready to share with clients and stakeholders.

How It Works

From Scan to Report in Four Steps

A streamlined workflow built for engineers in the field.

1

Start a Scan

Open or create a project. Point your iPhone camera at the surface and begin scanning.

2

Detect & Measure

Cracks are highlighted in real time. AR overlays show exact dimensions on screen.

3

Log Crack Details

Add notes, photos, and location tags. Severity is auto-classified and saved to your project.

4

Track & Export

Monitor crack history over time and export a full PDF report with all data and photos.

Support

We're Here
to Help

Have a question or issue? Reach our support team directly and we'll get back to you.

Structurascan.support@gmail.com →
Frequently Asked Questions
StructuraScan uses a custom-trained Core ML model for structural surfaces. When you point your camera at a wall, pillar, or beam, it analyses each frame and identifies crack patterns, estimating severity based on width, length, and propagation geometry. An internet connection is required for processing.
From the Projects screen, tap the "+" button at the top right. Enter the project name and location. You can then begin new scans directly from within the project.
Open any crack from its project and tap "Re-Inspect". StructuraScan saves the new scan alongside the original, building a timeline so you can track whether the crack is stable, growing, or worsening.
Yes, an internet connection is required to use StructuraScan. Crack detection and processing rely on a live connection to function correctly. Please ensure you have a stable connection when scanning.

Privacy Policy

Your Data, Your Control

Effective Date: January 1, 2025

Data We Collect

We collect only what's necessary to operate the service:

  • Camera images captured during scan sessions
  • Scan records (measurements, notes, timestamps)
  • Device identifiers for crash diagnostics (anonymised)
  • Optional: email address if you contact support

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to:

  • Provide and improve app functionality
  • Display your scan history within the app
  • Generate reports at your request
  • Diagnose technical issues and improve reliability

Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to third parties. Scan images and data remain on your device unless you explicitly export or share a report. Anonymised usage statistics may be shared solely to improve performance.

Data Protection

All locally stored data is protected by iOS device encryption. Transmitted data is secured using TLS 1.3. We follow Apple's App Store security guidelines and conduct regular security reviews.

Your Rights

  • Access all data stored by the app at any time
  • Delete data via uninstall or in-app reset
  • Export scan data in standard formats
  • Request deletion of support emails or account data
  • Opt out of anonymised analytics in app settings

Children's Privacy

StructuraScan is designed for professionals aged 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe a minor has used the app, contact us immediately. This policy may be updated; continued use after updates constitutes acceptance.

For any privacy questions or data deletion requests, contact Structurascan.support@gmail.com. We respond within 5 business days.
